PLATFORM

Zoooo Platform.

One platform. One system state. Decisions as mechanisms.

PHILOSOPHY
Unify state. Execute decisions.
A single mechanism connecting integration, simulation, and intelligence—built for operational control.
MODULE
Zoooo Core
Integration and state. Real-time and governed.
  • —Data integration + normalization
  • —Real-time event processing
  • —Ontology + access control
MODULE
Zoooo Simulation
Dynamic system modeling and digital twins.
  • —Counterfactual scenarios
  • —Stress tests
  • —Intervention evaluation
MODULE
Zoooo Intelligence
Prediction and risk—wired into control loops.

  • —Risk modeling
  • —Decision provenance
